sutta: 4 once when the exalted 1 dwelt near savarti at jeter grove in anata pindika spa this thought came to the venerable maha mogalana gone apart for solitude to how many devas is there this knowledge we have 1 to the stream are no more for the abyss in sureness we make for the awakening beyond i just stopped here to uh comment a bit now maham ogalana when he was dwelling in solitude in seclusion he thought whether there are many devas who have entered the stream that means have become an arya that means and no more for the abyss that means they will never be reborn into the woeful plains of the hell realm the animal realm and the ghost realm in sureness to make for the awakening beyond that means once a person has become an arya then he will definitely become fully enlightened in a few more lifespans then the sutta continues now at that time a monk named tisa had just died and was reborn in 1 of the brahma worlds and they knew him even there as tisa the mighty tisa the powerful then the venerable maha mogalana as a strong man might stretch out his bent arm might bend his stretched arm vanished from jetta grove and appeared in that brahma world and deva tisa saw the vennable 1 from afar coming along and on seeing him said come worthy moglana welcome worthy mogulana it's long since you made this round i mean come here pray be seated good sir here is the seat ready and the venerable maha mughlana sat down and deva tisa after saluting sat down also at 1 side then said the vulnerable maha mogalana to devatisa so seated to how many to how many devasta is there this knowledge we have 1 to the stream are no more for the abyss in sureness we make for the awakening beyond and this said the 4 royal devas worthy sir have this knowledge what have they all this knowledge no were these sir not all those 4 royal devas who possess not perfect faith in the buddha dharma and sangha possess not perfect faith in the virtues beloved by aryans they know not that but those who possess such faith they know we have won to the stream are no more for the abyss in sureness we make for the awakening beyond and is it just the 4 royal devas who have this knowledge or do the devas of the 33 yamas devas the devas of tusita the devas who delight in creating and the devas who have power over others creations also have this knowledge they also already sir have this knowledge but all of them no not those who possess not perfect faith in the buddha dharma and sangha and the virtues but those who have such faith they know it and the venerable maha mughallander approved and commended brahmatisa's words and as a strong man might to stretch and bend his arm he vanished from the brahma world and appeared at jetta grove that's the end of the sutta
commentary: is 1 of the interesting sutas which shows how those arahants in those days he had psychic power so they could he could just vanish from earth and appear in the heavens and come back in the same way and you can see like this devatisa because he was a good monk that when he was reborn as a deva he had he was very powerful very mighty they they called him the powerful this almighty who practice the holy path well when they are reborn as devas they are very mighty and powerful and here it is stated that those who become arya are those who have unshakable faith in the buddha dharma and sangha and they also have perfect moral conduct now perfect moral conduct is not uh doesn't it's not all the 5 uh precepts uh if you look at the aryan eightfold path we have 3 factors that comprise the sila section and it is right speech right action and right livelihood and right speech is uh abstaining from the 4 kinds of wrong speech and from lying from malicious tale bearing from [Music] cause words and from idol gossip and right action is to abstain from killing from stealing from committing adultery and wrong livelihood is a right livelihoodner is that kind of livelihood that does not harm other living beings or oneself so it does not uh include the precept against drinking that is why in 1 of the sutas in the we find that there was 1 person but 1 sakian by the name of sarakani it seems he he took to liquor he must have drank a considerable amount of liquor and uh and yet the buddha said that he was when he died that he was an arya so these are the 4 characteristics of aryana unshakable faith in the buddha dhamma and sangha and he has perfect virtue the next suta is
